query:
UPDATE host_listings 
SET 
  overseasExperience = 'Lived in the U.S. for over a decade before returning to China',
  languages = '["Mandarin","English"]',
  funFacts = 'I specialize in teaching the art of dumpling making, a skill passed down through generations in Chinese families. We offer 5 different filling options to customize your experience!',
  whyHost = 'I love teaching visitors the hands-on skills of traditional Chinese cooking, especially the meditative art of folding dumplings. It\'s a chance to share culture through an interactive, memorable experience',
  culturalPassions = 'Preserving traditional Chinese cooking techniques and passing them on to the next generation through hands-on teaching',
  otherPassions = 'Culinary education, cultural exchange through cooking, and helping people connect with Chinese traditions in a fun, interactive way'
WHERE id = 120001;
command:

SET 
  overseasExperience = 'Lived in the U.S. for over a decade before returning to China',
  languages = '["Mandarin","English"]',
  funFacts = 'I specialize in teaching the art of dumpling making, a skill passed down through generations in Chinese families. We offer 5 different filling options to customize your experience!',
  whyHost = 'I love teaching visitors the hands-on skills of traditional Chinese cooking, especially the meditative art of folding dumplings. It\'s a chance to share culture through an interactive, memorable experience',
  culturalPassions = 'Preserving traditional Chinese cooking techniques and passing them on to the next generation through hands-on teaching',
  otherPassions = 'Culinary education, cultural exchange through cooking, and helping people connect with Chinese traditions in a fun, interactive way'
WHERE id = 120001;
